summary.summary: Fixes an off-by-seconds filter in Stat.StateModel that caused today's per-day meal bucket to be excluded from date-range averages. calculateAveragesForDateRange previously filtered cached per-day entries by testing the bucket's start instant against startDate; the change tests bucket-window overlap (dayStart < endDate && dayEnd > startDate) so a day is included if any moment of it overlaps the requested range (addresses #1181). Separately, the code that built the per-day cache was simplified: the prior grouping + average logic was replaced with a Dictionary keyed by startOfDay using uniquingKeysWith to sum per-day totals, and the cached property/terminology was renamed from dailyAveragesCache to dailyMealTotalsCache (function renamed to calculateAndCacheDailyTotals). (Sources: pr:gordolio/Trio#1188, pr:nightscout/Trio#1188, commit:5ac5cebefcc4ded3b663c2f35ff750b6f88f7c26, commit:75da5e9682737334e0e315f22147ad068ff31b6f, commit:a7827806c79fdbf8690463158b5095b4962f1319, file:680291be0cce, file:9d61f928d9ac, diff:b2879763e027)
summary.userFacingImpact: Fixes the issue where the Meals stats chart could show zero carbs/fat/protein for the current day because the start-of-day bucket was excluded when the view's startDate was a few seconds past midnight. After this change, the current day's macros should be included in date-range calculations (Sources: pr:gordolio/Trio#1188, commit:5ac5cebefcc4ded3b663c2f35ff750b6f88f7c26, diff:b2879763e027).
